title: The address of an automatic object should not be assigned to another object that may persist after the first object has ceased to exist
description: What is the potential impact? An automatic object is an object whose lifetime is automatically managed. The storage for an automatic object, e.g. a local variable, is allocated at the beginning of the enclosing code block and is deallocated at the end.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: The address of an automatic object should not be assigned to another object that may persist after the first object has ceased to exist
